result.stderr:
Usage:
    Cato [<option>...] [<content-directory>]
Options:
    -c, --host-name=<name>     The host name to serve at.
                               If omitted, the default is "localhost".
    -p, --port-number=<number> The port number to serve at.
                               If omitted, the default is 8080.
    -?, --help                 Display this help.
    <content-directory>        The directory containing the files to serve.
Single-letter arguments can be combined. For example, -c -p can be replaced with -cp.
